user_feedback:
when the game is paused, I don't want to see the game be grayed out or see any paused press esc to resume 

but I also don't want the hud/cursor/controls text to disappear when the game is paused
analysis:
- Issue identified: When the game is paused, the HUD (level info, score, key status, controls text) disappears. The user wants the HUD to remain visible during pause, but without any gray overlay or "PAUSED" message appearing.
- Files affected: game.js
- Changes needed: Add a renderHUD(p) call in the PAUSED game phase block to keep the HUD visible when paused. The game rendering is already preserved (no gray overlay), we just need to ensure the HUD stays on screen.
